steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The task requires emphasizing a difference between quintidi and decadi. The correct answer must use explicit contrast language and show what made each type of day distinct from the other.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: discusses only one type of day without drawing a contrast to the other. ✗
  • Choice B — 'whereas quintidi honored animals..., decadi honored agricultural tools...': directly contrasts the two day types using "whereas" — quintidi honored animals (the ram), decadi honored tools (the sieve). ✓
  • Choice C: fails to draw a distinction between the two types of days. ✗
  • Choice D: discusses only one type of day without drawing a contrast to the other. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
